Spring Data MongoDB
  1. org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.query

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.query.Field

Packages that use Field
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.query
MongoDB specific query and update support.

  • Uses of Field in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.query

    Methods in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.query that return Field
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Field
    Field.FieldProjectionExpression.as(String name)
    Set the name to be used in the result and return a Field.
    Field
    Field.elemMatch(String field, Criteria elemMatchCriteria)
     
    Field
    Field.exclude(String field)
    Exclude a single field from being returned by the query operation.
    Field
    Field.exclude(String... fields)
    Exclude one or more fields from being returned by the query operation.
    Field
    Field.exclude(Collection<String> fields)
    Exclude one or more fields from being returned by the query operation.
    final <T> Field
    Field.exclude(TypedPropertyPath<T,?>... properties)
    Exclude one or more properties from being returned by the query operation.
    Field
    Query.fields()
     
    Field
    Field.include(String field)
    Include a single field to be returned by the query operation.
    Field
    Field.include(String... fields)
    Include one or more fields to be returned by the query operation.
    Field
    Field.include(Collection<String> fields)
    Include one or more fields to be returned by the query operation.
    final <T> Field
    Field.include(TypedPropertyPath<T,?>... properties)
    Include one or more properties to be returned by the query operation.
    Field
    Field.position(String field, int value)
    The array field must appear in the query.
    Field
    Field.projectAs(MongoExpression expression, String field)
    Project a given MongoExpression to a field included in the result.
    Field
    Field.slice(String field, int size)
    Project a $slice of the array field using the first size elements.
    Field
    Field.slice(String field, int offset, int size)
    Project a $slice of the array field using the first size elements starting at offset.
